content:
Often new players are asking for a Tier List.  I'm not really a fan of a large general tier list. 

Instead I created a Tier List for each realm. And further divided the realm tier list into one for Damage Dealers and another for Supports.

https://docs.google.com/document/d/1yjtQY0Wtrncz_ztNo4l6FN3N31fQ5WL2L7Xj41EpTRk/edit?usp=sharing

UID: 100930016

I’ve been playing the game since March 2025.   On Social media, there are a lot of newcomers asking for help. However some of the responses from people ...

content: should have put enlightment numbers at the bottom character frame
Thanks. I'll probably do an update this weekend. Just need some time to ponder what I should edit/update.

This is a resource from the Mythag University server containing a **PowerPoint that elegantly explain important Morimens Mechanics and Terminologies.**
Very useful for all new players to get an initial understanding of them.
https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1pnheXD_pkjz8YGmWWlQPnw4eXr6NRm-W6267c0K1_QU/edit?slide=id.p1#slide=id.p1

If there is anything that needs to be updated or added, feel free to let me know.
